title: delissea angustifolia var. lanaiensis
intro: Delissea angustifolia var. lanaiensis, also known as Lanai delissea, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the island of Lanai in Hawaii. This plant is a member of the gesneriad family and has been traditionally used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Delissea angustifolia var. lanaiensis include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as its potential to support immune function and reduce oxidative stress. Delissea angustifolia var. lanaiensis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being and support the body's natural healing processes.
